expertAssessments.rationale: The targeted production AI sidebar recheck exercised the exact Q-NEW46a wording after the frontend clarification bypass fix. The prompt no longer stopped at the server-scope clarification UI and produced a grounded anomaly analysis with whole-fleet anomaly evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage CLI checked current billing period after production QA; effective usage 17.2740 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed spike observed.

completedImprovements.title: Q-NEW46a 이상 징후 분석 프롬프트가 clarification 없이 전체 anomaly scan으로 실행
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.56 Playwright production QA showed no '조금 더 구체적으로 알려주세요' dialog and returned Cloud Run AI anomaly analysis with 전체 서버 이상 징후 확인 evidence.
